message:
🐛 Remove hardcoded Google Drive API key from source (#922)

The API key should only come from the GOOGLE_DRIVE_API_KEY env var
(set in .env which is gitignored), not be embedded in source code.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
